title: tilia mandshurica var. pekinensis
intro: Tilia mandshurica var. pekinensis, also known as the Chinese linden or Manchurian linden, is a plant species that belongs to the Tilia genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Tilia mandshurica var. pekinensis include lowering blood pressure, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the flowers, leaves, or bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
